summary: Stage 1 / Day 1 'Alien First Contact' frontend end-to-end happy path PASSED. Onboarding gating, sessionStorage persistence under key 'afc_state_v1', all 8 Day 1 scenes (1.1 through 1.7 = 7 playable scenes per data file), 3 decisions with effect math verified (D1 option A => scientific_knowledge=55, trust_ishaan=53), status badge transition SIGNAL DETECTED -> FIRST CONTACT after scene 1.7, Signal Feed auto-population (7 items), DMs (4 threads, Vikram verbatim DM present, unread amber dot fires and clears on open), Reflection 3 questions + variable summary with 6 stat bars + 4 relationship indicators, and Begin Day 2 button correctly disabled. Zero console errors during full playthrough.

issues:
H1 'INTERNATIONAL' and 'FIRST CONTACT MISSION' render with no whitespace between when read via textContent (visual line-break is via
). Cosmetic only; visually rendered correctly per screenshot.

critical_code_review_comments: Brief mentions '8 Day 1 scenes' but DAY1_SCENES contains 7 scenes (1.1-1.7), which matches the expected 7 feed items. Confirm intent with PM — either content is missing scene 1.8 or the brief copy is off by one.
MissionChat.jsx: the divider-push effect runs in StrictMode dev twice; safe in prod build but worth memoizing scene init to a ref-gated effect.

MissionChat advance() uses setTimeout chains via timeoutRef but only stores the latest timer; nested setTimeouts inside the same tick are not all cleared on unmount. Low risk for Day 1 but should be made cancellable for Day 2+.
afcState.loadState merges defaults shallow over vars only; nested objects like dms/scene_progress are not defaulted on shape drift — fine for v1 key but plan migration path before Stage 2.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Day 1 happy path is green. sessionStorage key is 'afc_state_v1'. Decisions take ~2-4s of typing+reaction animation; use waits on 'continue-btn' and 'decision-option-A/B/C' as gates. DM unread dot fires only after scene 1.1's dm item is processed (~end of 1.1). Status badge flips to FIRST CONTACT only after scene 1.7 mounts. Last continue button label is 'Proceed to Reflection'. Begin Day 2 button is intentionally disabled and must remain so for Stage 1.
